rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash` for description which accurately captures 'Rectoris Scholaribus' over `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Rectori. Scholanbus'. Visual inspection confirms `gemini-flash`'s reading. Both correctly identified no monetary amounts and header type.

rows.notes: Amounts (19/1/10) are in full consensus and visually clear. For the description, `gemini-flash`'s 'Natio 1830' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Natalis 1850'.

rows.description: Augment at St. Newinft et Bredon
rows.notes: Amounts (24/5/5) are in full consensus and visually clear. For the description, `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Newinft' is a better reading than `gemini-flash`'s 'Newport' after close visual inspection. However, `gemini-flash`'s 'Bredon' is visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Merton'. The final description combines these best readings.

rows.notes: Selected `gemini-flash` for all monetary values and description. `gemini-flash` is correct for description 'Thien' and `amount_pounds` '37'. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read 'Shiers' and '32' pounds; visual inspection confirms 'Thien' and '37'. Shillings and pence were in consensus.

rows.description: Augment Kidlenston pro tithes ann. part. R.D.
rows.notes: Amounts (36/15/2) are in full consensus and visually clear. For description, visual inspection shows the name starts with 'K' and reads as 'Kidlenston' (better than `gemini-flash`'s 'Redlenston' or `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Kellington'). `gpt-5-mini` accurately read 'pro tithes ann. part. R.D.', which `gemini-flash` misread as 'pro 7mos anno part.'. The final description combines the best readings.

rows.description: Stipend ad fest D: Jo: Bapt et officiariis
rows.notes: Amounts (18/8/11) are in full consensus and visually clear. For description, 'D:' (from `gemini-flash`) is visually correct over `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Dno'. The final word is 'officiariis' based on careful visual inspection, overriding both `gemini-flash`'s 'officiarii' and `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Officiaris'.

Shillings and pence were in consensus.
